description: Psychiatric diagnostic evaluation with medical services
rationale: The clinical note documents a comprehensive initial psychiatric assessment. This includes a detailed history (present illness, psychiatric, medical, family, social), a mental status examination, establishment of diagnoses (Axis I-V), and a treatment plan involving medical services such as prescribing new medications (Lexapro, Trileptal, Lunesta, Ativan), adjusting existing ones (Seroquel, Wellbutrin), and ordering laboratory tests (electrolyte profile).
